creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Mario,

Thanks for the patch. A few notes to take into account:

Q/A:  /tmp/252716/databases/pgloader3/pkg-plist: There are only 1 items in the plist.  Consider using PLIST_FILES instead of pkg-plist when installing less than 6 items.
 /tmp/252716/databases/pgloader3/pkg-descr: includes lines that exceed 80 characters.
 Makefile: [23]: You may remove pkg-plist if you use PLIST_FILES and/or PLIST_DIRS.
 Makefile: COMMENT should begin with a capital, and end without a period
 files: empty directory should be removed.

^Triage: Please confirm this change passes QA (portlint, poudriere at least).
--
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/testing.html


Thanks!
